full_text:
Han Pin (Delin)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Pin, styledDelin, was born in Anding. Neglected his family to study, moved around due to warfare and resorted to begging. Impervious to cold and refused to give his name.
